meta.notes: Beat Swarm Music Lab onboarding sequence: run the real gate corridor, event-driven tap-orb foundation creation, then music-missile Accent Rhythm creation. Use tap_orb_foundation_committed_to_bass_drive and tap_orb_foundation_lane_resolved events to compare committed Bass Drive motif/instrument against director foundation lane playback. Expected result: the weapon, Bass Drive, and Accent Rhythm motifs commit in order without replacing or interrupting the preceding motif.

level1ArrangementMusicality.reason: Intensity audition uses a forced lane/layer stack and is validated by musicIntensityAudition instead of the normal arrangement musicality contract.
